warming_air.label: Air warming (recent baseline)
warming_air.description: Near-surface air temperature anomaly for 2025 relative to the 1979-1988 average.

warming_vs_preindustrial_air.label: Air warming (pre-industrial)
warming_vs_preindustrial_air.description: Blended near-surface air temperature anomaly for 2021-2025 relative to the 1850-1900 pre-industrial baseline.

warming_sst.label: Sea-surface warming
warming_sst.description: Sea-surface temperature anomaly for 2025 relative to the 1982-1991 average.

reef_stress.label: Coral heat-stress trend
reef_stress.description: Trend in annual coral heat stress (DHW risk score) from 1985 to 2025; higher values indicate faster increases.
